hotel_name: Extended Stay America Suites - Fairfield - Napa Valley

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Racists  while in BED 7an strange men in room SCARED Me To Death break in ur room while 68yr old Black woman sleeps they were standing over Me for an HOUR while I slept 😭😲😡

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The staff refused to bring me the luggage cart .

reviews.title: Never again..
reviews.text: I will never stay here again…

reviews.title: Respond to my letter, thank you
reviews.positives: I booked on booking.com for a one night stay. When I arrived with my 9 month old child at 8:00pm (at night) I was denied services (after already paying for my room). I was told by the front desk that I had to leave and could not stay for I was not 21. I am 20 (over the age of 18, and adult nevertheless). I then had to leave late at night with my small child to have to find another room everything was pretty much booked out. This is there policy, I understand. However I was not refunded. I submitted this to booking.com to process my refund, booking.coms response was that the property never responded. I was supposed to have a response within their time frame of 24 hours. Nothing. Please, fix this issue.
reviews.negatives: I booked on booking.com for a one night stay. When I arrived with my 9 month old child at 8:00pm (at night) I was denied services (after already paying for my room). I was told by the front desk that I had to leave and could not stay for I was not 21. I am 20 (over the age of 18, and adult nevertheless). I then had to leave late at night with my small child to have to find another room everything was pretty much booked out. This is there policy, I understand. However I was not refunded. I submitted this to booking.com to process my refund, booking.coms response was that the property never responded. I was supposed to have a response within their time frame of 24 hours. Nothing. Please, fix this issue.

reviews.title: Find some place else
reviews.text: We had to change rooms because the minute we walked in we could smell mildew and whatever else had happened in there. We were moved to the third floor which was better but the hallways smelled terrible. If there are other options, choose someplace else to stay!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The crappy breakfast

reviews.title: One of the worst if not the worst hotel I’ve stayed at.
reviews.text: If there was a ranking lower than 1 star I would give it. No service at all, staff was rude. The room was dirty and smelly, no facilities to speak of. Agoda sure messed this one up in recommending it.

reviews.title: We didn’t feel safe, right next to the freeway with no amenities on the property. We left a day early due to being uncom
reviews.positives: The property was run down, dirty and noisy
reviews.negatives: There was nothing we liked about the property

reviews.title: Anywhere else
reviews.text: After trying two rooms they no longer had anything where everything worked well we could stay just horrible

reviews.title: Good value with terrible communication
reviews.negatives: Property did not respond to messages sent on the day of the reservation - unacceptable.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Incomplete basic needs in a room, eg., towels, soaps, shampoo, toothpaste. Don’t have enough for each guest.

reviews.title: Worst experience ever.
reviews.negatives: The hotel was disgusting, the cliental were seedy and the room was very uninviting. I checked out after one night of a 3 night stay and relocated.

reviews.title: Good Value for the price
reviews.text: The staff was friendly and helpful.  The room was nice enough although my non smoking room did have a smoky smelling bathroom. I would recommend making sure to ask not to have your room right next to the stairwell!

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: I didn’t stay here this night and would like a refund

reviews.title: One Rotten Apple 🍎
reviews.text: There is a older 👵🏼woman who works there after hours who has an attitude problem she tried to get me banned to be put on the DNR lists because of her own personal bias towards me because of a small misunderstanding BE AWARE OF HER.she shouldn’t be allowed to to work there anymore. All the other staff are well trained and professional. The Manager is awesome 😎

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: TV is extremely small . Kitchen really old .

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: a little over prices and now i have misc charges 4 times for almost $82 each and no one can tell me why …..

reviews.title: Don’t stay skip to the next and step the extra few bucks
reviews.positives: Dirty room, hair all over bathroom counter and floor, crumbs all over in corner of living room floor, smelt like musty old cigarettes yucky
reviews.negatives: Dirty

reviews.title: Not the cleanest, but good for the price.
reviews.text:
The cheapest you can find in Fairfield for amenmenties offered. 

This is the place for smokers and pet owners. The third floor reeks the smell of cigarettes even though it's a non-smoking floor. 

You definitely want to bring in your own disinfecting wipes prior to checking in. The rooms are semi-cleaned and you may find left-behind belongings in the rooms from previous guest. 

You get what you pay for!

reviews.title: I wouldn’t stay here again
reviews.negatives: Our room wasn’t ready for hours as there was a “glitch” in the system even though I had called upon booking the room and they stated 3P we could check in they called me about 5P that it still wasn’t ready and because I was already at the concert it’d be ready by then. We get there about midnight & the clerk stated there was a midnight audit with the worst attitude/demeanor you could possibly think of stating it can take 15 minutes to hours for it to be done or we could cancel [literally absurd] I asked if she could manually do it since it was paid for or any other way she said no. She leaves in her car and comes back later meanwhile we’re calling other hotels while we’re exhausted with all our belongings as we couldn’t drop them off earlier in the day and all of a sudden she called a number and manually got us in! Mind you she had another pair of ladies there that had already been waiting in their car over an hour and all because she didn’t do her job properly. Customer service was horrible and trying to get ahold of someone to put in our complaint was worse! Horrible experience

reviews.title: This hotel was smelly
reviews.text: The location was great for what I needed. The hotel had an awful smell, especially in my room and it was dirty. I also did not feel safe walking to my vehicle alone.

reviews.title: Very bad customer service.
reviews.negatives: Asked to be moved rooms and they didn’t help us.  We had to leave the premises.

reviews.title: It’s ok
reviews.text: What can I say it’s a room, nothing special

reviews.title: I have never been here...
reviews.text: But keep getting requests to rate my stay. I wish there were a way to communicate to Agoda that they have the wrong email address.

reviews.title: Very bad condition property and rooms.
reviews.positives: I only liked the location. Everything else was very bad. Very unclean, broken amenities, broken appliances, rude front desk staff. Please return my first day charges. If not in full at least 75% of it.
reviews.negatives: Everything else was very bad. Very unclean, broken amenities, broken appliances, rude front desk staff. Please return my first day charges. If not in full at least 75% of it. On the first day they intentionally gave me a bad bad room. Room 303-Blood stains on carpet, weed smell, broken heating and AC, bathroom clogged, very bad experience. After all these they changed the room to 214. Please give my money back of the first day

reviews.title: The Bottle Rock Takeover
reviews.text:
So this was my last stay there for a while Bottle Rock Guest took all the rooms which excludes all longer stay guest that can only afford 1-3 days out . Of course it was the nighttime staff that were quick to let me know I couldn’t book with a quirky attitude. 
 

If that wasn’t all when I woke up for my next shift I had a notice that was slid under my door as if I wasn’t already rudely informed that there was no more rooms to book .when I walked into the hallway to grab something from my car notice mostly all the rooms were super quiet as if no one else was present in the hotel rooms. There was also a spectator guy taking pics of everything jamming up the property manager about the conditions . What an awkward and uncomfortable experience this was

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: It’s basically like a motel 6 but extended stay really out dated and dirty

reviews.title: Calm place to stay but sometimes rude people at front desk
reviews.text: I tried to make convo to get rid of awkwardness at the front desk but I was hushed , told by the front desk that he or she don’t want to hear it and to keep it moving …???! Like gee I can’t enjoy my morning with a small convo ? But you will take my money right?! How rude !!!

reviews.title: Not happy
reviews.negatives: They did not have a public restroom. We got there and we needed to use the restroom, but we needed to check in first so we can use our restroom and our room then they did not have an ice machine. We had to make our own ice in our refrigerator they had two trays to make ice so I filled up the ice Cubes and had to wait till they made ice to get ice. Unacceptable was so disappointed.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: This is good place for animal lovers as most folks on our floor had dogs so expect some noise.

reviews.title: Horrible experience felt like a crack house , and much worse than a motel 6.
reviews.negatives: So many homeless people in the parking area and staff let them stay there which didn’t make us feel safe . The room smelled like pee . The towels were dirty. The room felt dirty. The only reason we stayed was because we had to since we were going to a music festival and there wasn’t any more options .

reviews.title: Um what do I say on this one…..
reviews.text: If you are someone who is displaced from your previous residence and you stay over often please be careful because sometimes this property can over book without notice and not consider that there are people who work everyday to stay over . They know times are hard but really don’t really have much sympathy it’s just business to them😕 there is a big difference between morning and night shift staff, night shift staff has some pretty rude people at times and morning staff are the veterans that know the ins and outs here overall this my only complaint . Thank you Sharon and Luz 😊

reviews.title: Bad and smelly
reviews.negatives:
The smell is awful. There is construction work noise. 
Very dirty rooms and bathroom.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Mattress had coils poking me in the back. Pillows were hard and couldn't sink in to them,

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: no service was available

reviews.title: Some people shouldn't assume.
reviews.text: When being friendly to tell staff of things they may not be aware of to be insulted then lacked as breaking the rules by a staff member. Some people shouldn't be so quick of the lip to insult or make accusations of a guest but other than that most of the staff were delightful rooms were clean.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Nothing  definitely will be more selective when it comes to this chain of hotel
reviews.negatives: The pictures online are definitely not what the rooms look like  my room was dinghy and the bed side lamps were broken  I didn't even stay the whole night left 4 hrs after checking in please don't post clean bright rooms when it's not what you are renting out

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Nice place for families with young children

reviews.title: Microwave has rust not safe for cooking .bathroom sink plugged ceiling dusty dirty
reviews.positives: It was close to the mortuary I was going to attend a service at
reviews.negatives: The entry way under construction ladders and unsafe tools laying everywhere I almost feel over a roll of tape I didn’t see . I’m sure it’s on video

reviews.title: For travelers who need the kitchen
reviews.text:
Perfect for families that have to cook while traveling.
Which also means other guests also cook. 
Great variation of scents, always. Never boring.
I like the leather reclining seat feature.
Good internet. Clean large rooms.  Lots of parking.

reviews.title: Room 201 should be closed until refurbished entirely
reviews.positives: It had a kitchen though no utensils
reviews.negatives: my bathroom was in abhorrent condition with plaster falling from the ceiling into the tub and onto the floor.  The room smelled moldy and I needed to keep the bathroom fan on all night to minimize its effect.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Got in late, had to leave early. Got no sleep due to loud stereo all night next door. Waste of money
reviews.negatives: Rooms old and small. Beds small(full) and old and lumpy. Kitchen had trim missing with exposed plywood on edge of counteracts. Worst part was the neighbor who blasted music till 1 am.  I will never stay at an extended stay if I can help it. Long term hotels have guests that use them as apartme to, think they own the place, and have zero respect for short term guests. I knew better than to book here, it was only $10 more to stay at the Marriott only 1 block away.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: will definitely stay here again. Front desk staff was very courteous & friendly.

reviews.title: Wasn’t worth the savings or the kitchen amenities. Next time I’d chose a property not in Fairfield and go back to my Mar
reviews.negatives: It says it has a fully stocked kitchen but you had to ask for every little thing to use the kitchen . Like a pot, spoon or even a plate but it was first come first serve so they were always out . First night I asked for some plates and was told there wasn’t any clean ones available because housekeeping hadn’t washed any . Then I’d imagine if you did manage to get some items you have to lug whatever you would have received up to your room . Complimentary coffee always empty . Hotel bathroom was dirty found long hairs in bathtub. Hotel was noisy lots of “residents” more than hotel guests . Shady location people drinking in the parking lot . The elevator always smelled like weed . Just not a relaxing stay .

reviews.title: Comfortable 😊
reviews.text: The staff are friendly, Comfortable beds, Clean rooms..,, the only Negative I have with them is that they should have a Monthly rates membership for those who have to stay longer due to living situations.

reviews.title: Not the best experience
reviews.negatives: The staff and that the power went out for about four hours the next day at check out the staff didn’t mention anything in regards to the check out. Like a partial refund etc.

reviews.title: My Temp Home
reviews.text: Best rates , Clean rooms  and Friendly Staff

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The room was supposed to be for non smokers but it smell like cigarettes super strong…

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great room for families and staff are great

reviews.title: Got a flat tire in the parking lot. Key did not work, room was very old and iron was dirty too.
reviews.negatives: An older facility than the pictures suggest.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Appliances NOT Working  stove broken with a LOOSE plug under the HOT burner, Angela says just cook with it like that DANGEROUS 
Dog poop at window 
Hole in Screen room full of flys manager feels this is BEST for Me 68yrs old Black Women??? Ummm.....

reviews.title: Would not go back.
reviews.negatives: Rooms were definitely used and abused, freezing in the hall way but stuffy in the room. No ice! Water was pouring out of a light fixture in the lobby! No real breakfast just granola bars and coffee

reviews.title: Lovely place away from home
reviews.text: Overall this is a decent hotel , the staff is friendly and professional. The rooms are clean  . My only complaint is the constant fire drills to test the alarms, I don’t think they realize their fire alarms work and keep disturbing guest with drills before going to Work People need sleep 😂🤭

reviews.title: Skip this one. "Extend" your stay somewhere else.
reviews.positives:
Great location. Close to food and shopping. 
Great, friendly staff. Lovely kitchenette and bathroom.
reviews.negatives: Smelled like an old ashtray in the hallway and the beds were like sleeping on concrete slabs with a mattress pad on top. It was awful. We woke up feeling sore and stiff and exhausted from not being able to sleep all night.

reviews.title: You need a big fridge and to cook
reviews.text: This place has a standard big fridge and stove so yes you looking for a kitchenette this is the place you want beds are comfortable. Tvs great . You get housekeeping  every 8 days. Its  cheaper to book on agona unless your doing 30 days.

reviews.title: I was there for a week they don’t have cleaning service , I was told they only come and clean every two weeks
reviews.positives: The fridge and stove  even tho the stove took awhile to heat up
reviews.negatives: Very quite and was able to sleep

reviews.title: Good stay
reviews.text: Stayed for 2 days. Room was clean and big. Has a electric stove and full size fridge. Quite hvac system. Good size bed  Right next to Chuck e cheese.

reviews.title: Wild
reviews.negatives: Bad experience felt unsafe and not valued

reviews.title: Only 1 issue
reviews.text: Great place, maintenance does not fix things while you are still renting the room. Had a messed up door the month I was there.

reviews.title: My stay could have been better.
reviews.negatives: The room was a place to sleep but not comfortably. Something in the building had a bad odor, I think the air filters needed to be changed & it caused me to have an asthma attack. The hot water was very slow. My room had spiders. Also the building was being worked on so it was hard to come in and out of the building. I did not complain during the stay to the desk because I got the impression it wouldn’t have made a difference.

reviews.title: Great place
reviews.text: Great place, maintenance does not fix things while you are still renting the room. Had a messed up door the month I was there.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The fact they over booked. So one of are 2 bed rooms turned into 2 single bed rooms. Ok we can work with that. But then took 45.minutes to get intonroom because door was not opening with key. Finally the lady got door open but could not come.out of room amd let door close because keys (even master) did not work. And the room with the not working doors bathroom was not cleaned before we.checked in. All morning desk agent said was ya I heard about the problem have a good day.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: The staff is friendly. I checked into a room that the door didnt close properly. They never fixed it. I just had to checkv door to make sure it closed properly. That was the only bad thing. Everything else was excellent.

reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.text: Clean rooms, good free breakfast, very helpful and accomodating staff, and good location.

reviews.title: I've stayed in better places
reviews.positives: Convenient location, staff was fantastic and parking was good
reviews.negatives: Hotel was dates, carpet in rooms ols, appliances old and need updating.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.title: It was not bad but probably won't stay again

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Our two day stay was great. The staff is very friendly and helpful. Great location with shopping all around. The hotel itself was clean and quiet. We had no problems.I definitely will be coming back when I come to visit fairfield.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Rundown

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: I like this place. Very cozy and quiet. Stayed with my daughter for 2 nights. Good location. Facilities a little bit old but well managed.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The water in the shower never got warm

reviews.title: Rest day off!!!
reviews.text: I recommend this place to everybody especially to those who want to rest and relax during off duties. It is affordable with a nice ambiance and staff.

reviews.title: Glad it’s over.
reviews.negatives:
“Breakfast” was a their “grab & go” consisting of coffee, instant oatmeal, nutrigrain bars & if lucky a prepackaged muffin. 

Room was adequate, reasonable clean but dated. 
First room assigned was rejected because of overwhelming odor. Second room was tolerable.

It you wanted a coffee pot or other items you had to request from front desk. No ice machine.  Let’s just say it was an experience staying there.

reviews.text: Superb

reviews.negatives: Had to use the breaker to turn on and off the burners in the room.

reviews.title: Excellent stay
reviews.text: We had an excellent stay at this property! The  location was convenient and the cleanliness of the room was exceptional. The staff were friendly and helpful. We highly recommend the property for s comfortable and pleasant stay!

reviews.title: It was alright
reviews.negatives: It smelled like cigarettes through the whole building a bit ghetto.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text: Clean and quiet. Perfect

reviews.title: King bed
reviews.positives: We liked the staff. The front desk was helpful. It was clean, and the bed was comfortable. It's a pretty decent place to stay for just one night.
reviews.negatives: It's a little run down. The door was kinda beat up. Stains on the carpet. The TV sat kinda low. There's no shampoo, but they had the bars of soap there. I read that we would have to ask the front desk for it?

reviews.title: well kept inside & outside
reviews.text: all comforts of home provided...coffee maker, hair dryer, cutting board, coffee packets, extra blanket, anything forgot/ need???- just ask for them & you got it!! Caring staff tried very hard to met my needs during a family health crisis while we were traveling & 10 hours away from home.

reviews.title: Could be better
reviews.positives: It was convenient for my purpose ,the staff
reviews.negatives: The rooms need to be updated Better breakfast

reviews.title: a caring hotel
reviews.text: with my husband a patient at the local hospital i have been frazzled & the staff at this hotel have been most supportive. They have ensured my needs were met ( ie reminding me their coffee packs for my in room coffee pot are available at the desk 24 hrs) & reminding me if i had my room key (as an 80 yr old traveller this was most appreciated)..The establishment is well taken care of inside & out (noticed staff clearing trash from landscape)

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Comfortable bed. Clean desk. Great lighting.
reviews.negatives: Noisy refrigerator. I heard fire alarm sound coming from the fridge once I got into room. Told front desk, but no one came by to look into it.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text: Staff were the best.  Super helpful and friendly.

reviews.title: It was okay
reviews.negatives: It seems a little run down.

reviews.title: Extended Stay Fairfield
reviews.text: Clean hotel, nice staff, and what i like the most is the kitchen inside each room.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: Stay four days and never receive room service bed was to loud squeak every time you move

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice clean rooms with kitchens and a good free breakfast with coffee, oatmeal and muffins.  Very nice staff here too

reviews.title: Would not stay there again.
reviews.positives: Next to a great Mexican restaurant. The young lady who checked us in was friendly. The room was okay. The room was clean and well appointed.
reviews.negatives: We were not placed in the room we asked for.  I could not connect to the wifi. The breakfast that was provided was a muffin and coffee.  That my friend is NOT breakfast. False advertising.

reviews.title: Best place for any type of travelling
reviews.text: Love the kitchen the best

reviews.title: Staff was great. We were first given a room that smelled like smoke and when we complained the staff immediately moved u
reviews.negatives: The rooms were tired looking.

reviews.title: 卫生差
reviews.text: 几乎没有早餐，就几个廉价的蛋糕，不理解为什么订房的时候还有早餐费用这个项目？太糟糕了，自己不会再订，也不会推荐任何朋友。

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives: It was close to our location
reviews.negatives: The bedroom table, TV, remote and kitchen was not wiped down and cleaned. So I had to do it.

reviews.title: I will pay more for another hotel
reviews.negatives: But clean

reviews.title: Above average

reviews.title: Cheap

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: Quiet, clean and helpful.
reviews.positives: Front desk is responsive and helpful.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.negatives:
Hallways smell like cigarettes, continental breakfast mounted to a nutri-grain bar, dry oatmeal (no cream or sugar) and coffee, nothing more.
On my return 4 days later coming back from Yosemite, I was asked for ID of my adult Son's.  I was asked questions by the manager why I returned.  I was under the impression, I was being questioned for some perceived illegal activity, hooker, drug dealer or illegal alien? This attitude put a dent in my vacation.  Discusting! I will no longer be staying at Extended Stay America in Fairfield, CA. 
One question I was asked, before given a key, was what type of rating I would give the Hotel, I said 8.5, he asked if I could give it a 9. Whoever this guy is, he is a jerk. My rating of this hotel is 5.0.

reviews.title: It was good.

reviews.negatives: The room floor are dusty and I have allergies so it flares up

reviews.title: Great value cleaning this was excellent

reviews.title: We may or may not return
reviews.positives: Grounds well kept.  Room a little larger than some.  No maintenance issues with the room. Full size refrigerator.
reviews.negatives: A little packaged muffin is not breakfast, no yogurt or fruit. Coffee was awful.  Cheap linens.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: room was great, stayed nice and cool thru the night.
reviews.negatives: shower pressure wasn't great, my toilet wouldn't flush, lol. i got bad food poisoning and coudn't use the toilet anymore cuz i was plugged up.

reviews.title: Convient
reviews.positives:
Did not have breakfast 
Your hotel manager gave us excellent customer service. Very courteous, friendly, and went above and beyond
